description: Outcome-blind initial-frame probe for frozen pi0.5/PaliGemma semantic candidate scoring.
prompt_template: Robot task: {task} At the current observation, choose the one next semantic subtask from these valid choices: {choices} Respond with exactly one choice.
candidates: transport the black bowl to the plate
place the black bowl on the plate

interpretation.label_scope: Only the initial task stage is labeled. No reward, success, cost, collision, or future observation is read.
interpretation.primary_score: length-normalized conditional log probability over the finite candidate set
